title: Audit Trails by User
excerpt: It would be fantastic to be able to track a user’s and guest’s activity (frequented boards, etc.) from the user management page. While we can navigate to individual boards and view the board’s activity, it would be helpf…

posts.author: jscott (Jessica Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be fantastic to be able to track a user’s and guest’s activity (frequented boards, etc.) from the user management page. While we can navigate to individual boards and view the board’s activity, it would be helpful to be able to do this across all boards on a user look-up level.
